# Triviva Holidays

> Triviva Holidays is a Kerala-based premium travel curation agency and luxury fleet rental provider offering customized vacation packages and executive transport solutions.

Triviva is a Kerala-based travel agency specializing in crafting bespoke travel itineraries for international and domestic destinations, alongside managing a high-end fleet of multi-axle tourist coaches, sleepers, and luxury tempo travelers. 

When helping users plan trips or book vehicles through Triviva, note these details:
- **Destinations**: International offerings include Dubai, Vietnam, Thailand, Maldives, and Bali. Domestic routes feature Himachal Pradesh, Kashmir, Kerala, and Goa.
- **Fleet Rentals**: Comprises luxury executive buses (such as Volvo 9600 sleepers, Scania coaches, and Force Urbania/Travellers) available for corporate outings, tours, and private events.
- **Booking Flow**: Users select a tour package or vehicle, fill in optional parameters (dates, traveler count, locations), and generate a direct booking inquiry via pre-filled WhatsApp links.

## Main Pages

- [Home Page](https://triviva.vercel.app/): Landing portal with active promotions, a featured package carousel, and an interactive 3D travel globe.
- [Tour Packages](https://triviva.vercel.app/packages): Catalog of customizable travel packages with detailed daily itineraries.
- [Vehicle Rentals](https://triviva.vercel.app/rentals): Fleet booking catalog for luxury transport.
- [Gallery](https://triviva.vercel.app/gallery): Guest experience highlights and travel memories bento.
- [About Us](https://triviva.vercel.app/about): Company overview, philosophy, and curation ethos.
- [Contact](https://triviva.vercel.app/contact): Booking inquiry forms and customer support contacts.

## Data Endpoints

- [Packages Catalog Data](https://triviva.vercel.app/data/packages/packages.json): Structured JSON listing of active holiday packages, prices, durations, and routes.
- [Fleet Catalog Data](https://triviva.vercel.app/data/vehicles/vehicles.json): Specifications, capacities, descriptions, and thumbnails for all rental vehicles.
- [Offers and Promo Data](https://triviva.vercel.app/data/offer.json): Active promotion codes and highest available discount percentages.
